creator: clebermartim@gmail.com
text:
Dear,

I am Brazilian and my English isn´t very well. I´m sorry if this place
not is the correct for these problems.

I´m trying to install tk84 by ports and occurred the follow error:

------------------------------
===>  Installing for tk-8.4.14_3,2
===>   tk-8.4.14_3,2 depends on executable in : tclsh8.4 - found
===>   tk-8.4.14_3,2 depends on shared library: X11.6 - found
** Missing /usr/ports/x11-toolkits/tk84/files/pkgIndex.tcl.in for tk-8.4.14_3,2.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/x11-toolkits/tk84.
------------------------------

Actually, I´m trying to install a amsn package.

Thanks for anything help.

Cleber

How-To-Repeat: This error ocurred when I´m trying to install a amsn package.
